# HiggsMotion — higgsmotion.com
HiggsMotion is a Crystal LED Film Display System distributed in Malaysia by EMI Automation Sdn Bhd under the iNHAUS brand.

## What it is
Transparent LED film that adheres directly to existing glass surfaces — no frame, no structural changes required.
Transforms any flat glass into a full-colour dynamic digital display while maintaining transparency when off.

## Products
Three pixel pitch options:
- P4: 62,500 dot/m², transparency >82%, brightness 1,500 cd/m², optimal viewing ≥4m
- P6: 27,778 dot/m², transparency >85%, brightness 3,000 cd/m², optimal viewing ≥6m (most popular)
- P10: 10,000 dot/m², transparency >90%, brightness 2,000 cd/m², optimal viewing ≥10m

Common specs: LED lifespan ≥100,000hrs, refresh rate ≥3,840Hz, module size 240×1065mm, Novastar control system

## Applications
Commercial storefronts, shopping mall atria, glass curtain walls, interior partitions, hotel lobbies,
exhibition displays, escalator glass panels, ceiling hanging installations

## Pricing
Price on request. Custom quotation provided within 24 hours based on screen size, pixel pitch, and site requirements.
Contact EMI Automation Sdn Bhd for a tailored proposal.

## Who to contact
EMI Automation Sdn Bhd (authorised distributor for Malaysia)

## Brand
HiggsMotion™ is a product brand of INHAUS Sdn Bhd, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
